title: GregTech Rubber Tree for Dynamic Trees
description: Adds a Rubber tree from GregTech CEu Modern for Dynamic Trees
body:
This mod adds the Rubber Tree from the GregTech CEu Modern mod to Dynamic Trees.

Unlike the original mod, the tree now spawns in jungles, and its appearance has been changed (the developer of this mod believes this is the more accurate look for the tree — and you won’t be able to convince them otherwise :| ).

Huge thanks to the Dynamic Trees Team for their help <3
